description.value:
A massive Iberian two-handed sword used to hold off multiple attackers. Its reach and balance allow a trained fighter to protect companions by denying approach.

Training

LevelProperties
UntrainedTwo-Handed, Heavy, Reach, Melee 2d4, Slashing
BasicTwo-Handed, Heavy, Reach, Melee 2d6, Balanced
MasterTwo-Handed, Heavy, Reach, Melee 2d6, Balanced â€” all bonuses apply
Master PerkAs a reaction you enter a protective stance. All attacks made against your allies within your reach have disadvantage until the start of your next turn.

rmeData.masterPerk: As a reaction you enter a protective stance. All attacks made against your allies within your reach have disadvantage until the start of your next turn.
